nodes.label: Dump
nodes.rationale: DUMP (Distributed Utility for Message Passing) is a serverless online clipboard for sharing text through short links.

nodes.label: Dump Architecture
nodes.rationale: React + Vite + TypeScript frontend, Hono + Cloudflare Workers backend, Cloudflare KV storage.

nodes.label: Architecture Rules
nodes.rationale: Route handlers must be thin; services contain business logic. Components are presentational, hooks/services hold logic.

nodes.label: Graphify
nodes.rationale: Tool to query the knowledge graph for codebase and architecture questions.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Agents SDK
nodes.rationale: Build AI-powered agents on Durable Objects with state, WebSockets, SQL, scheduling, and AI integration.

nodes.label: Cloudflare AI Gateway
nodes.rationale: Universal gateway for AI model providers with analytics, caching, rate limiting, and routing capabilities.

nodes.label: Cloudflare AI Search
nodes.rationale: Managed semantic search and RAG service combining auto-indexing, vector search, and built-in LLM generation.

nodes.label: Entire Batch Retried After Single Error
